text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At a school assembly, Light Hello<n>explains our
goals for the Grand<n>Concert.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Our vision is a concert where all<n>students get a
chance to sing, and all<n>fans get a chance to
convey the<n>emotions they feel for their favorite
runners.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Tachyon steps in to bolster our<n>case. She
prods the students to think<n>what else, other than
gratitude, they<n>want to convey to their fans.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Both runners and fans harbor selfish<n>desires. The
passion generated when<n>those desires collide
could open the<n>door to new possibilities.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The students seem convinced—one by<n>one, hands
go up across the room,<n>signaling a desire to
participate.
